scores.notes: Company name OCR has minor character errors ('D.I.Y.' as 'D.1.Y.'). Address is fully captured and accurate. Date and total amount match ground truth well, though total is shown in multiple formats causing slight confusion. Table structure is poorly preserved as the OCR output includes detailed item lines not in ground truth and no clear table format is maintained. Layout is mostly correct but includes extra unrelated text and some formatting inconsistencies. Overall, all ground truth text is present but embedded in a larger, more detailed receipt text.
